raw_text: {"round_id":"CB-2026-06-02-1W","model_id":"anthropic-claude-opus-4-8","provider":"anthropic","mode":"closed_capability","portfolio":[{"option_id":"TECHNOLOGY","allocation_pct":30,"rationale":"Strong momentum (+8.5% 7d, +21% 30d) with ISM new orders rising and AI capex accelerating; tech leadership likely persists short-term."},{"option_id":"SEMICONDUCTORS","allocation_pct":25,"rationale":"Global semi sales +25% QoQ, AI infrastructure spend up 75% in 2026; strongest sustained momentum leader."},{"option_id":"SOUTH_KOREA","allocation_pct":15,"rationale":"Extreme momentum (+19% 7d) driven by semiconductor exports; trend persistence into the week."},{"option_id":"BROAD_AI_TECH","allocation_pct":15,"rationale":"AI spending forecast $2.59T in 2026 (+47% YoY); broad exposure to accelerating AI theme with strong recent returns."},{"option_id":"NASDAQ100","allocation_pct":15,"rationale":"Growth/tech tilt with strong momentum; benefits from soft inflation print and stable Fed expectations near-term."}],"confidence":0.55,"portfolio_rationale":"Concentrate in tech/AI/semiconductor momentum where catalysts (AI capex, semi sales, ISM new orders) and strong trailing trends are intact, seeking alpha over SPY in a one-week window with low VIX and tight credit spreads supporting risk appetite."},"rationale_summary":"Tilt to highest-momentum tech and AI names supported by accelerating AI/semiconductor fundamentals and a benign macro backdrop for the one-week horizon.","key_risks":["Sharp tech/semiconductor momentum reversal or factor rotation away from crowded AI trade","May 5 employment report or June 3 ISM Services surprise triggering rate/growth repricing that hits high-beta growth","Korea/Taiwan semiconductor names mean-reverting after parabolic short-term gains","Concentration risk—portfolio heavily correlated to a single AI/tech theme"]}
